note: Honest baseline for the LLM-free rubric gate: every golden case passes all five rubrics in the deterministic stubbed run. `python evals/gate.py --inject-regression` drops this to 0.0 (each case's target rubric flips), proving the gate is non-vacuous. Regenerate after a dataset change with `python evals/gate.py --out /tmp/r.json` and copy its `pass_rate` here. F10b grows the dataset to >=50 cases against this same runner.
